# Skill: AUTOSAR Classic Platform Development

## When to Activate
- User asks about AUTOSAR Classic architecture or configuration
- User needs BSW (Basic Software) module guidance
- User requests RTE generation or SWC design support
- User is configuring ECU extract or ARXML files

## Standards Compliance
- AUTOSAR Classic Platform R20-11 to R22-11
- ISO 26262 ASIL A/D (platform support)
- MISRA C:2012 (coding guidelines)
- ASPICE Level 3
- ISO 21434 (SecOC module)

## Key Parameters
| Parameter | Range/Options | Unit |
|-----------|---------------|------|
| OS task count | 10-100+ | tasks per ECU |
| RTE generation | Manual/Auto | configuration |
| BSW module count | 20-80+ | modules per ECU |
| CAN message count | 50-500+ | messages per ECU |
| NVM block count | 10-200+ | blocks for calibration |
| Diagnostic memory | 1-10 | DTC groups |

## Platform Architecture

```
+----------------------------------------------------------+
|                 Application Layer                         |
|  +------------------+  +------------------+              |
|  |  EngineMgmt SWC  |  |  TransmissionSWC |              |
|  +------------------+  +------------------+              |
|           |                     |                        |
+-----------|---------------------|------------------------+
|           v                     v                        |
|  +--------------------------------------------------+   |
|  |          Runtime Environment (RTE)                |   |
|  +--------------------------------------------------+   |
+--------------------------|-------------------------------+
|         Basic Software Layer (BSW)                       |
|  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+        |
|  |  CAN   |  |  ADC   |  |  PWM   |  |  NVM   |  ...   |
|  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+        |
|  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+        |
|  | CanIf  |  |  Adc   |  | Icu    |  |  Dem   |  ...   |
|  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+        |
|  +------------------+  +------------------+            |
|  |    Com (PDU)     |  |    Dcm (UDS)   |            |
|  +------------------+  +------------------+            |
|  +--------------------------------------------------+   |
|  |              OS (OSEK/VDX compliant)              |   |
|  +--------------------------------------------------+   |
+--------------------------|-------------------------------+
|          Microcontroller (MCAL)                          |
|  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+        |
|  |  MCU   |  |  PORT  |  |  DIO   |  |  SPI   |  ...   |
|  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+  +--------+        |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

## Software Component (SWC) Design

### Component Template (ARXML)
```xml
<APPLICATION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
  <SHORT-NAME>EngineControlSwComponent</SHORT-NAME>

  <!-- Port Interfaces -->
  <PORTS>
    <P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
      <SHORT-NAME>VehicleSpeedPort</SHORT-NAME>
      <PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE">
        /NS/Interfaces/VehicleSpeed_IF
      </PROVIDED-INTERFACE-TREF>
    </P-PORT-PROTOTYPE>

    <R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
      <SHORT-NAME>AcceleratorPedalPort</SHORT-NAME>
      <REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF DEST="SENDER-RECEIVER-INTERFACE">
        /NS/Interfaces/AcceleratorPedal_IF
      </REQUIRED-INTERFACE-TREF>
    </R-PORT-PROTOTYPE>
  </PORTS>

  <!-- Internal Behavior -->
  <INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
    <RUNNABLE-ENTITIES>
      <RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
        <SHORT-NAME>CalculateTorqueRunnable</SHORT-NAME>
        <BEGIN-PERIOD>0.01</BEGIN-PERIOD> <!-- 10ms -->
        <CAN-BE-INVOKED-CONCURRENTLY>false</CAN-BE-INVOKED-CONCURRENTLY>
      </RUNNABLE-ENTITY>
    </RUNNABLE-ENTITIES>
  </INTERNAL-BEHAVIOR>
</APPLICATION-SW-COMPONENT-TYPE>
```

### Runnable Entity Pattern (C Code)
```c
/* Generated by RTE Generator */
#include "Rte_EngineControl.h"

/* Shared data (passed via RTE) */
static float s_engine_speed_rpm;
static float s_requested_torque_nm;

/* Runnable: Execute every 10ms */
void EngineControl_CalculateTorque_Runnable(void) {
    /* Read from R-ports */
    float accelerator_position;
    Rte_Read_EngineControl_AcceleratorPedalPort_Value(
        &accelerator_position);

    float engine_speed;
    Rte_Read_EngineControl_EngineSpeedPort_Value(
        &engine_speed);

    /* Application logic */
    s_requested_torque_nm = EngineControl_MapTorque(
        accelerator_position, engine_speed);

    /* Write to P-ports */
    Rte_Write_EngineControl_EngineTorquePort_Value(
        s_requested_torque_nm);
}

/* Initialization runnable (called once at startup) */
void EngineControl_Init_Runnable(void) {
    s_engine_speed_rpm = 0.0f;
    s_requested_torque_nm = 0.0f;
}
```

## BSW Module Configuration

### CAN Stack Configuration
```c
/* Can_Cfg.h - Generated by DaVinci Configurator */
#define CAN_DEV_ERROR_DETECT        STD_ON
#define CAN_VERSION_INFO_API        STD_OFF
#define CAN_MAIN_FUNCTION_PERIOD    0.001f  /* 1ms */

#define CAN_CONTROLLER_COUNT        2U
#define CAN_CONFIG_SET_COUNT        1U

/* CAN Controller 0: Powertrain CAN (500 kbps) */
#define CAN_CONTROLLER_0_NAME       "CanController_Powertrain"
#define CAN_CONTROLLER_0_BAUDRATE   500000U
#define CAN_CONTROLLER_0_PROPAG   0.0000002f
#define CAN_CONTROLLER_0_SEG1       0.0000012f
#define CAN_CONTROLLER_0_SEG2       0.0000006f

/* CAN Controller 1: Chassis CAN (500 kbps) */
#define CAN_CONTROLLER_1_NAME       "CanController_Chassis"
#define CAN_CONTROLLER_1_BAUDRATE   500000U

/* Hardware Object (HO) configuration */
#define CAN_TX_PDU_COUNT            20U
#define CAN_RX_PDU_COUNT            30U

/* Notification callbacks */
void Can_RxNotification(Can_HwHandleType Mailbox,
                        Can_IdType Id,
                        uint8 CanDataLength,
                        const uint8* CanDataPtr);
void Can_TxConfirmation(Can_PduType* PduInfo,
                        Can_NotificationResultType NotificationResult);
```

### Communication Stack (Com + PduR)
```c
/* PduR Configuration - Routing Table */
#define PDUR_CONFIGURATION_ID       0x0055AAUL
#define PDUR_ROUTING_PATH_COUNT     50U

/* Routing: CAN <-> Application */
PDUR_ROUTING_PATH(
    .pduRSourcePduId = PDUR_CANIF_RX_PDU_ID_001,
    .pduRDestPduId = PDUR_COM_RX_PDU_ID_001,
    .pduRTransferProperty = PDUR_PENDING
)

PDUR_ROUTING_PATH(
    .pduRSourcePduId = PDUR_COM_TX_PDU_ID_001,
    .pduRDestPduId = PDUR_CANIF_TX_PDU_ID_001,
    .pduRTransferProperty = PDUR_PENDING
)

/* Com Signal configuration */
#define COM_SIGNAL_COUNT            100U
#define COM_SIGNAL_GROUP_COUNT      10U

COM_SIGNAL(
    .ComSignalName = "VehicleSpeed",
    .ComSignalType = uint16,
    .ComHandleId = 0x001,
    .ComBitPosition = 0,
    .ComBitSize = 16,
    .ComSignalArcUseUpdateBit = TRUE,
    .ComSignalEndianness = COM_LITTLE_ENDIAN
)
```

### Diagnostic Stack (Dcm + Dem)
```c
/* Dcm Configuration - UDS Services */
#define DCM_PROTOCOL_VERSION        "ISO14229-1"
#define DCM_CONNECTION_COUNT        2U

/* Supported UDS Services (0x10, 0x11, 0x22, 0x27, 0x2E, 0x31, 0x85) */
DCM_SERVICES_SUPPORTED:
    0x10 - DiagnosticSessionControl
    0x11 - ECUReset
    0x22 - ReadDataByIdentifier
    0x27 - SecurityAccess
    0x2E - WriteDataByIdentifier
    0x31 - RoutineControl
    0x85 - ControlDTCSetting

/* Security Access Levels */
#define DCM_SECURITY_LEVEL_COUNT    3U
#define DCM_SECURITY_LEVEL_1        "EcuProgramming"
#define DCM_SECURITY_LEVEL_2        "EcuDebug"
#define DCM_SECURITY_LEVEL_3        "OemSupplier"

/* Dem - Diagnostic Event Manager */
#define DEM_DTC_COUNT               256U
#define DEM_DTC_FORMAT              DEM_DTC_FORMAT_STANDARD
#define DEM_FREEZE_FRAME_COUNT      10U

DEM_DTC(
    .Dtc = 0x001234UL,
    .DtcOrigin = DEM_DTC_ORIGIN_PRIMARY_MEMORY,
    .EventId = DEM_EVENT_ID_001,
    .DtcFormat = DEM_DTC_FORMAT_STANDARD,
    .FunctionalUnit = 0x01U
)
```

## OS Configuration (OSEK/VDX)

### Task Definition
```c
/* Os_Cfg.h - Task configuration */
#define OS_APPLICATION_MODE           0x01U
#define OS_TASK_COUNT                 15U

/* Task: EngineControl_10ms (ASIL D) */
TASK_DEFINITION(
    .TaskName = "EngineControl_10ms",
    .TaskPriority = 5,
    .TaskState = SUSPENDED,
    .TaskSchedule = FULL,
    .TaskActivation = 1U,
    .TaskStackSize = 512U,
    .TaskStackSizeUnit = OS_TASK_STACK_SIZE_UNIT_WORD,
    .EventMask = 0x00U  /* No events, time-triggered */
)

/* Task: Diagnostic_100ms (ASIL A) */
TASK_DEFINITION(
    .TaskName = "Diagnostic_100ms",
    .TaskPriority = 2,
    .TaskSchedule = NON,
    .TaskActivation = 1U,
    .TaskStackSize = 256U
)

/* Alarm (periodic trigger) */
ALARM_DEFINITION(
    .AlarmName = "EngineControl_Alarm_10ms",
    .AlarmCounterRef = "OsCounter_SystemTime",
    .AlarmIncrement = 10U,  /* 10ms = 10 * 1ms tick */
    .AlarmCycleTime = 10U,
    .AlarmTaskRef = "EngineControl_10ms"
)
```

## Memory Layout (Linker Script)

```
/* Linker script for AUTOSAR ECU */
MEMORY
{
    /* Flash sections */
    BOOTCODE (rx) : ORIGIN = 0x00000000, LENGTH = 64K
    APPCODE   (rx) : ORIGIN = 0x00010000, LENGTH = 1984K
    CALDATA   (ro) : ORIGIN = 0x00200000, LENGTH = 128K
    NVM_EMU   (ro) : ORIGIN = 0x00220000, LENGTH = 64K

    /* RAM sections */
    SAFETY_RAM (rwx) : ORIGIN = 0x40000000, LENGTH = 32K
    DATA_RAM   (rwx) : ORIGIN = 0x40008000, LENGTH = 192K
    DMA_BUFFER (rwx) : ORIGIN = 0x40038000, LENGTH = 16K
}

SECTIONS
{
    /* Bootloader section */
    .bootcode : {
        *(.bootcode)
    } > BOOTCODE

    /* Application code (read-only, executable) */
    .appcode : {
        *(.text)
        *(.text*)
        *(.rodata)
        *(.rodata*)
    } > APPCODE

    /* Calibration data (read-only) */
    .caldata : {
        *(.caldata)
        *(.caldata*)
    } > CALDATA

    /* Initialized data */
    .data : {
        _sdata = .;
        *(.data)
        *(.data*)
        _edata = .;
    } > DATA_RAM AT> APPCODE

    /* Uninitialized data */
    .bss : {
        _sbss = .;
        *(.bss)
        *(.bss*)
        *(COMMON)
        _ebss = .;
    } > DATA_RAM
}
```

## Approach

1. **System Configuration** (DaVinci/EB Tresos)
   - Import system description (ARXML)
   - Configure ECU extract
   - Select BSW modules and set parameters

2. **SWC Design** (Model-Based or Hand-Coded)
   - Define port interfaces
   - Design runnables and timing
   - Generate RTE and integration code

3. **Code Generation**
   - Run BSW module generator
   - Generate RTE from SWC description
   - Generate OS configuration

4. **Integration and Build**
   - Integrate generated code with application
   - Configure linker script for target
   - Build with MISRA-compliant compiler

5. **Validation**
   - Unit test (host-based or PIL)
   - Integration test (HIL with bus simulation)
   - Diagnostics test (UDS service validation)

## Deliverables

- ECU configuration (ARXML)
- BSW module configuration (C code + headers)
- RTE generated code
- Application SWC implementation
- Memory map and linker script
- Test report (coverage, diagnostics)

- Vector DaVinci Configurator/Developer
- EB Tresos (for NXP/Infineon MCUs)
- MATLAB/Simulink (SWC modeling)
- CANoe/CANalyzer (network analysis)
- Lauterbach TRACE32 or iSystem (debug)
